MORDREDSABER-MORDRED.title: Mordred
MORDREDSABER-MORDRED.description: The Knight of Treachery. Tank your rage behind the Helm, then tear it off to cash it in as crimson-lightning Crits and Clarent Blood Arthur — the blade that strikes hardest against those who sit higher than you.
MORDREDSABER-MORDRED.goldMonologue: Gold? Keep it. The only throne I ever wanted couldn't be bought.
MORDREDSABER-MORDRED.eventDeathPreventio: Not here. Not before I've torn that crown off his head.
MORDREDSABER-MORDRED.aromaPrinciple: I am no one's daughter and no one's pawn. I am Mordred — and I will be acknowledged.
MORDREDSABER-MORDRED.banter.alive.endTur: Come on, then. I'll take that helm off when I'm good and ready — and you'll wish I hadn't.
MORDREDSABER-MORDRED.banter.dead.endTurn: The helm... stays on a while longer. Tch. Fine. I can still bleed you from behind it.
